data.body:
- remove knot type, it's not useful info
- remove prio, it's not useful info
- replace them with the fully qualified knot id (or hierarchy alias, if it has one) so we can see what project it belonged to.
- remove the abbreviated knot id from the byline, slide the byline items (last_updated, tags) to the left
data.title: Retakes Screen: Minor cleanups
